DP.491.0000:
[0103,0001]’s mom: Oh, hi,
[0103,0000].\f
Are you looking for [0103,0001]?\f
He was gone for a second, but then
he came running right back home.\f
He just can’t sit still, that boy.
I wonder who he takes after?
